Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Sean F. Connolly, Deputy City Attorney for petitioner and moving party: City and County of San Francisco
Paul J. Byrne for Joinder: San Francisco Zoological Society
Shepard S. Kopp, Esq., for respondent and opposing party: Amritpal Dhaliwal and Kulbir Dhaliwal
Court Reporter: Lucy Carrillo-Gruggs, Telephone (650)588-7404

Hearing held. Joinder by the San Francisco Zoological Society in City and County of San Franciso's petition to preserve evidence and request for an order outhorizing inspection of documents and things.
